Operation 'translateText' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (TranslateRequest structure), expected outputs (TranslateResponse structure), authentication requirements, and how language detection integrates with the translation flow. Enhanced version specifies input/output schemas, authentication, and clarifies the relationship between language detection and translation for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Translates text, HTML content, or performs transliteration between languages. Supports automatic language detection when the source language is not specified.
data.summary_suggestion: Translate text between languages with optional detection
data.description_suggestion: Translates text, HTML content, or performs transliteration between specified source and target languages. Supports automatic source language detection when not explicitly provided. Requires a TranslateRequest containing the text to translate, target language code, and optional source language code and mode. Returns a TranslateResponse with the translated text, detected language information, and translation metadata. Requires Bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (TranslateRequest structure), expected outputs (TranslateResponse structure), authentication requirements, and how language detection integrates with the translation flow. Enhanced version specifies input/output schemas, authentication, and clarifies the relationship between language detection and translation for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'detectLanguage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are overly minimal. Enhanced version clarifies the request/response schemas, explains what confidence information is returned, provides context about typical use cases (pre-translation language identification), and specifies authentication requirements for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Detects the language of the provided text content.
data.description_suggestion: Detects the language of the provided text content. Accepts a DetectLanguageRequest containing the text to analyze. Returns a DetectLanguageResponse with the detected language code and confidence information. Useful for determining source language before translation or for language identification tasks. Requires Bearer token authentication.
